name: invoice-iob
description: Create EN 16931 e-invoices — XRechnung/UBL/CII XML, a visual PDF, and German (ZUGFeRD/Factur-X) or French (Factur-X) hybrid PDF/A-3 — from simple fields. Fully local; no data leaves your machine.
long_description: invoice-iob turns simple invoice details into compliant e-invoices for the German/EU market. It generates XRechnung 3.0 (UBL & CII), generic EN 16931 UBL/CII, a human-readable PDF, and a ZUGFeRD/Factur-X hybrid PDF/A-3 — for Germany and for France (the factur-x-fr provider, French-localized with French business rules). Everything runs locally on your machine; no invoice data is ever transmitted. New countries and formats are added as plugins against a stable FormatProvider interface — call list_formats to see what this build supports.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create an EN 16931 e-invoice — XRechnung/UBL/CII XML, a visual PDF, or a ZUGFeRD/Factur-X hybrid PDF/A-3 (German or French) — and save it to the output folder. Call list_formats for the available formats.

tools.name: list_formats
tools.description: List the e-invoice formats available in this build.

output_directory.title: Output folder
output_directory.description: Folder where generated invoice files are written.
